# ZonzocTech — AI-Powered Web Development & SEO Agency

> ZonzocTech builds AI-powered web applications, full-stack solutions, and data-driven SEO strategies for businesses that want to grow online. Based in Sri Lanka, serving clients globally.

## What We Do

ZonzocTech is a digital agency specialising in:
- AI-powered SEO and search engine optimisation
- Full-stack web development (React, Node.js)
- AI web application development
- E-commerce development and optimisation
- Website maintenance, performance, and security
- AI software development and automation
- Google Search Console management and auditing

## Services

- [AI SEO Services](https://zonzoctech.com/ai-seo) — AI-driven keyword research, content optimisation, and technical SEO
- [SEO Services](https://zonzoctech.com/seo-services) — Full-service SEO strategy and implementation
- [AI Search Optimisation](https://zonzoctech.com/seo-ai-search-optimization) — Optimising for AI-powered search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google SGE)
- [Google Search Console](https://zonzoctech.com/google-search-console) — GSC audits, error fixing, and performance improvement
- [AI Software Development](https://zonzoctech.com/ai-software-development) — Custom AI-integrated software solutions
- [Full-Stack Web Development](https://zonzoctech.com/full-stack-web-development) — React, Node.js, and modern web technologies
- [AI Website Design & Development](https://zonzoctech.com/ai-website-design-development) — Smart, conversion-optimised website design
- [AI Web Application Development](https://zonzoctech.com/ai-web-application-development) — Scalable web apps with AI capabilities
- [E-commerce Development](https://zonzoctech.com/ecommerce-development-optimization) — Online store development and conversion optimisation
- [Website Maintenance](https://zonzoctech.com/website-maintenance-performance-security) — Ongoing maintenance, speed, and security
